description.value:
A slim, grease-stained booklet bound in oilcloth. The subtitle reads "Simple Meals for the Road, or How Not to Poison Your Party."

Inside, a handful of practical recipes are written in plain language with margin notes from at least three previous owners. Anyone with a mess kit and a campfire can follow these.

Recipes
DishDCIngredientsNotes
Camp Porridge81 Rations, 2 pints waterBoil it down. Don't overthink it.
Berry Preserves93 Wild BerriesKeeps well. Good for the road.
Roasted Mushrooms92 Edible MushroomsGolden over coals. Smell the camp up right.
Herb-Seasoned Rations101 Rations, 1 Wild HerbsA little effort goes a long way.
Smoked Fish102 Fresh FishLow fire, patience. Worth it.
Hearty Stew121 Rations*, 1 Fresh Meat, 2 pints waterFeeds the whole party. The real thing.

* Rations for Hearty Stew scale with party size.
